questions.text: Outline any concerns regarding the impact of the Acquisition on competition, including if Sika AG and Akkim (and its main brand in Australia, Akfix,) are close competitors in the supply of sealants, adhesives, PU foams and waterproofing products and there are not many alternatives or if one is a major supplier to competitors of the other.
Provide any additional information or comments that you consider relevant to the ACCC’s assessment of the Acquisition.
Provide a brief description of your business or organisation, including any commercial relationships with Sika AG and/or Akkim.
